---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# mlfactors

<!-- badges: start -->
[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/pauloguimaraes871/factoRverse/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/pauloguimaraes871/factoRverse/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)
<!-- badges: end -->

The goal of factoRverse is to construct portfolios with ML-based and characteristics-based signals

## Installation

You can install the development version of mlfactors from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:
      
``` r
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("pauloguimaraes871/factoRverse")
```

## Usage
